title: Scope and evidence freeze
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Workstream docs opened and first task selected.

title: Canonical Headless Render Operation proof
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Existing Rust facade SVG helpers share a private operation module; no public methods were deleted.

title: Adapter adoption of render operation
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman --features raster raster
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. CLI Mermaid input uses render_svg_with_pipeline_sync with CLI-owned pipeline; existing SVG input remains CLI format Adapter policy.

title: Pre-1.0 public adapter surface slimming
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Removed uncommitted shallow HeadlessRenderer *_with_diagram_id and *_sync_with convenience methods; retained documented readable/resvg-safe preset helpers.

title: Diagram family facts module
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Detector order, fast detect profile behavior, semantic/render parser registries, known-type side effects, and binding supported diagram metadata now project from Diagram Family Facts.

title: Diagram admission inventory
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-tree-view-svgs --check-dom --dom-mode parity --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
cargo run -p xtask -- compare-all-svgs --diagram treeView --check-dom --dom-mode parity --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. xtask admission inventory now projects the primary SVG matrix and root-deferred diagrams; check-alignment validates inventory paths/evidence and targeted treeView compare gates pass.

title: SVG root and viewport deepening
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-tree-view-svgs --check-dom --dom-mode parity --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
cargo run -p xtask -- compare-tree-view-svgs --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
cargo run -p xtask -- compare-all-svgs --diagram treeView --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Shared RootViewportPlan/ViewBox planning now owns root viewBox, width/height, and responsive style emission; treeView is the first proof family on the canonical root viewport path without fixture admission or comparator normalization changes.

title: PDF output size-limit hardening
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman --features raster svg_to_pdf
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. PDF export now validates intrinsic SVG size limits before vector conversion; fit/scale/page wrapping do not bypass complexity budget, while explicit unbounded raster options remain available for trusted oversized exports.

title: Raw SVG raster boundary hardening
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Raw SVG raster/PDF input now starts from a resvg_safe pipeline before CLI background/CSS postprocessors; conversion still applies the normal resvg-safe cleanup and size limits. This documents raw SVG as trusted input rather than claiming a general-purpose sanitizer.

title: Gantt CLI fixed-time controls
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. CLI parse/render/top-level modes now expose --fixed-today and --fixed-local-offset-minutes; Engine construction applies them, and typed render-model parsing now shares the same fixed local-time context as semantic JSON parsing for deterministic Gantt output.

title: Bindings fixed-time controls
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Shared options_json now accepts fixed_today and fixed_local_offset_minutes; HeadlessRenderer/HeadlessAsciiRenderer expose matching builders, and bindings-core applies the fixed-time context for parse/layout/render/validation paths.

title: Flowchart spacing zero parity
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman-render --test flowchart_layout_test --test flowchart_svg_test
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Flowchart nodeSpacing=0 and rankSpacing=0 now follow Mermaid's || 50 fallback semantics, while diagramPadding=0 remains preserved through the SVG viewBox path.

title: PresentationTheme migration continuation
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. PresentationTheme now covers XyChart and QuadrantChart visible role bundles, while chart_palette only owns palette parsing/derivation. Remaining raw theme reads in other families are deliberate follow-ons, not part of this bounded slice.

title: Family-owned typed semantic sanitization
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Engine no longer owns per-family typed common DB field knowledge; RenderSemanticModel dispatches sanitization to family-owned model methods, and typed render-model parsing now sanitizes Flowchart acc fields plus Treemap title consistently with the JSON common DB path.

title: Flowchart single semantic source
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Flowchart semantic JSON and typed render parsing now share one internal FlowchartSemanticSource; projection tests preserve shared fields and FlowDB ordering traces such as vertexCalls.

title: Fence JSON semantic fallback as adapter
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. RenderSemanticModel::Json is fenced to the built-in error diagram and custom diagram adapters on the render-model path; all pinned non-error built-in semantic parsers must have typed render parsers, and check-alignment no longer depends on ignored local fixtures/_deferred investigation directories.

title: Final verification and closeout
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-all-svgs --diagram treeView --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --filter upstream_docs_treeview_basic
handoff: DONE on 2026-06-06. Final gates passed except full parity-root, which is an existing root-only residual lane owned by docs/workstreams/mermaid-11-15-root-viewport-residuals. Root viewport no-growth budget was synchronized to the current 308-entry inventory after verifying the EventModeling 9-entry guard table is live and intentional.
